channel.title: News on BioML
channel.description: Recent content in News on BioML

item.title: New PhD student: Frederikke
item.description: We’re happy to have Frederikke Isa Marin in our group as a new PhD student! Frederikke is an industrial PhD student, shared between KU & Novozymes. She’s interested in modelling DNA and protein sequences using machine learning.

item.title: New PhD student: Sebastián
item.description: Welcome to Sebastián García López, our new PhD student! Sebastián is interested in the relationship between protein sequence and structure and deep probabilistic modelling for protein representation.

item.title: NNF grant
item.description: Ole Winther, Professor, Aasa Feragen-Hauberg, Søren Hauberg, Jes Frellsen, Anders Krogh and Wouter Boomsma received a prestigious grant from the Novo Nordisk Foundation (NNF) for collaborative research!
